title: crotalaria angulicaulis
intro: Crotalaria angulicaulis, also known as the angled rattlebox, is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving digestion. The herbal preparations of Crotalaria angulicaulis typically involve making tea from its leaves or roots, and in some cases, using it as a poultice or applying it topically for skin issues.
